Outline Recall tape Compact Mitral Stenosis (MS) Mitral stenosis is a condition in which the mitral valve opening is narrowed, restricting blood flow from the left atrium to the left ventricle. Mitral Stenosis (MS) Mitral stenosis is a condition in which the mitral valve opening is narrowed, restricting blood flow from the left atrium to the left ventricle. Causes: * Most commonly due to rheumatic fever * Congenital abnormalities (rare) * Calcification of the mitral valve (in elderly) Pathophysiology: Narrowing of the mitral valve → increased left atrial pressure → left atrial enlargement → pulmonary congesti
